metadata.name: AI Finance Research Agent synthetic replay dataset
metadata.description: Fictional demonstration news. It must not be represented as current real-world reporting.

items.title: AtlasAI releases an enterprise agent platform with audit logs
items.summary: AtlasAI announced a fictional enterprise agent platform featuring tool permissions, traceable execution and audit exports for regulated teams.

items.title: AtlasAI launches governed agent tools for regulated companies
items.summary: The fictional AtlasAI product adds approval gates, tool access policies and execution records intended for financial and healthcare users.

items.title: AtlasAI releases an enterprise agent platform with audit logs
items.summary: A duplicate copy of the AtlasAI announcement used to demonstrate title and URL deduplication.

items.title: NovaChip unveils lower-cost inference accelerator
items.summary: Fictional chip vendor NovaChip claims its NC2 accelerator reduces inference power consumption for transformer workloads.

items.title: Cloud providers plan support for NovaChip NC2 inference hardware
items.summary: Two fictional cloud providers said they are evaluating NC2 instances, potentially widening access to lower-cost model inference.

items.title: FinBench publishes an open benchmark for financial LLM evaluation
items.summary: The fictional FinBench suite covers document extraction, numerical reasoning, citation accuracy and compliance-sensitive refusal behavior.

items.title: Researchers introduce FinBench tests for financial language models
items.summary: FinBench provides fictional reproducible tasks for comparing finance-focused models and includes evidence-grounding metrics.

items.title: Market regulator proposes model-risk records for AI advisory tools
items.summary: A fictional consultation proposes documentation of training data limits, human review, model changes and incident handling for AI-assisted advice.

items.title: Proposed AI advisory rules emphasize human oversight
items.summary: The fictional proposal would require firms to record material model changes and define escalation paths for customer-facing AI failures.

items.title: VectorLake adds point-in-time controls for alternative data
items.summary: The fictional data platform introduced timestamp lineage, revision history and point-in-time exports intended to reduce look-ahead bias.

items.title: New alternative-data tooling targets backtest leakage
items.summary: VectorLake's fictional release focuses on dataset versions and historical availability timestamps for quantitative research.

items.title: OpenShield discloses prompt-injection test suite for finance agents
items.summary: The fictional OpenShield test set evaluates indirect prompt injection, unsafe tool calls and sensitive-data leakage in financial agents.

items.title: Finance agent red-team suite highlights unsafe tool-use risks
items.summary: A fictional red-team report finds that poorly isolated tools can allow injected documents to influence agent actions.

items.title: BrokerLab pilots AI research copilot with mandatory citations
items.summary: Fictional brokerage BrokerLab began an internal pilot that requires generated research notes to cite approved source documents.

items.title: BrokerLab tests cited AI assistant for analyst workflows
items.summary: The fictional pilot measures time saved, citation coverage and analyst correction rates before broader deployment.
